name: The Separator
description: Three rounds trading a descending ring handstand push-up count for an ascending squat variation — back squat, then front squat, then overhead squat — with burpees between each.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2016/9 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; time cap 16 minutes (women); men's cap not confirmed from available sources. One source described a slightly different women's movement order/rep count (ring HSPU descending 6-4-2 vs. the men's 12-9-6) that could not be fully corroborated -- this entry uses the men's structure, flagged per CONTRIBUTING
